# BP-33 negative: sentinel error type implements Is
lang: go
file: BP-33-safe.go
variant: stdlib
---
package sample

type notFoundError struct{}

func (e notFoundError) Error() string {
	return "not found"
}

func (e notFoundError) Is(target error) bool {
	actual, ok := target.(notFoundError)
	return ok && actual == e
}

var ErrNotFound = notFoundError{}
